prompt: Use $happycodex:happycodex. Context was compacted. The Skill is already loaded; do not read plugin caches, inspect unrelated history, or repeat equivalent searches. Inspect the bounded fixture once, then work read-only and reconstruct the exact next permitted action from durable repository facts. A candidate test failure that replaces a recorded baseline test failure remains in the baseline_failure domain even when its identity changed. For a replacement with a different durable identity, emit separate finding_classifications for both identities: classify the recorded identity as resolved and the replacement identity as candidate_new; do not collapse them under the shared test name. Do not edit, delegate, invoke review, or use the network. Return only the required JSON object.
